<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get userinfo"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/userinfo"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns identity claims for the authenticated user based on granted scopes.

**Differences from v1:**
- `groups` scope returns objects with name, type, slug, level, and title instead of just id arrays
- `staff.my.read` scope adds staff profile fields (firstname, lastname, etc.)

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>
